title: hieracium hirsutum subsp. chevallieri
intro: Hieracium hirsutum subsp. chevallieri, also known as the rough hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and fight infections. The health benefits of Hieracium hirsutum subsp. chevallieri include its potential to reduce pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
